privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to join a Jitsi Meet conference room at http://localhost:8080/WeeklySync and change the meeting subject to exactly 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review - Budget and Headcount'. The room URL is a local Docker-based Jitsi instance. The expected subject string is synthetic test data that the agent must set via the Jitsi Meet UI. The verifier checks both the full subject string and a partial match ('Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review') in the browser window title.
